voice.tone: confident, concrete, second-person, outcome-first. No buzzwords.

tech_to_outcome.RAG / vector search: instant, accurate answers pulled from your own docs — no one digging through PDFs
tech_to_outcome.agents / multi-agent: work that runs itself, 24/7, without another hire
tech_to_outcome.cold-email engine: a machine that books qualified meetings while you sleep
tech_to_outcome.voice AI (Vapi/Retell): every inbound call answered and qualified — at 3am, on a Sunday
tech_to_outcome.n8n / Modal automation: 100 manual hours a week your team does by hand — gone
tech_to_outcome.<30-day ship cycle: live this month, not next quarter
tech_to_outcome.full-stack / mobile: a real product in your users' hands in weeks
tech_to_outcome.Built with Claude Code: one senior operator moving at the speed of a whole team

opener_constraints.must_reference: one specific outcome the prospect likely cares about, derived from lead.notes

subject_constraints.must_be: a question or a specific outcome, not a company pitch

opener_examples: Noticed {company} raised recently — are you shipping AI features in-house or contracting them?
Looks like you're in beta for {product} — is the AI feature already in prod?
Saw {agency} grew recently — pipeline still SDR-heavy or automated yet?
How much of your team's week goes to manual ops right now?
Which AI initiative on your {company} roadmap keeps getting deprioritized?
What's the AI feature that's been on your roadmap two quarters?

cta.primary: Building something AI-shaped? Book a free 30-minute build session — we scope a first build on the call. No deck, no pitch.
